title: BEM-841 fix git push race
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-22 | 11:38 (UTC+3)'
script=Path('scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh')
script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\nmsg="${1:-Automated repository update}"\ngit config user.name "github-actions[bot]"\ngit config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"\ngit add -A\nif git diff --cached --quiet; then\n  echo "No changes to commit"\n  exit 0\nfi\ngit commit -m "$msg"\nfor attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do\n  if git pull --rebase --autostash origin main && git push origin HEAD:main; then\n    echo "safe_push_ok attempt=$attempt"\n    exit 0\n  fi\n  echo "safe_push_retry attempt=$attempt"\n  sleep $((attempt * 2))\ndone\necho "safe_push_failed"\nexit 1\n''')
runner=Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
runner_changed=False
if runner.exists():
    txt=runner.read_text(errors='ignore')
    original=txt
    # Ensure workflow has concurrency. If already present, leave it.
    if '\nconcurrency:' not in txt:
        anchor='permissions:'
        block='concurrency:\n  group: codex-runner-main\n  cancel-in-progress: false\n\n'
        if anchor in txt:
            txt=txt.replace(anchor, block+anchor, 1)
        else:
            txt=txt.replace('\njobs:', '\n'+block+'jobs:', 1)
    # Replace direct push commands with safe script when visible in workflow.
    txt=txt.replace('git push origin HEAD:main', 'bash scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh "CODEx safe push"')
    txt=txt.replace('git push || true', 'bash scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh "CODEx safe push" || true')
    txt=txt.replace('git push', 'bash scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh "CODEx safe push"')
    if txt != original:
        runner.write_text(txt)
        runner_changed=True
# Patch known dispatch result commit script too.
commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
commit_changed=False
if commit.exists():
    ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore')
    original=ct
    if 'git push' in ct and 'git_safe_commit_push.sh' not in ct:
        ct='''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\nbash scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh "workflow dispatch queue results" || true\n'''
    if ct != original:
        commit.write_text(ct)
        commit_changed=True
state={'bem':'BEM-841','status':'git_push_race_patch_applied','script':str(script),'runner_changed':runner_changed,'commit_script_changed':commit_changed,'created_at':created,'reason':'non-fast-forward push rejection from parallel Codex Runner runs'}
Path('governance/state/bem841_fix_codex_git_push_race.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem841_fix_codex_git_push_race.md').write_text('# BEM-841 | Fix Codex Git Push Race | PATCHED'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh tick to verify no non-fast-forward push rejection. Then continue Claude triad proof. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-841'+sep+sep+'Status: git_push_race_patch_applied'+sep+'Next: verify safe push and continue Claude proof triad.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['scripts/git_safe_commit_push.sh','governance/state/bem841_fix_codex_git_push_race.json','governance/reports/bem841_fix_codex_git_push_race.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem841_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']
if runner_changed: changed.append('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
if commit_changed: changed.append('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Added safe git pull --rebase --autostash push retry script, added codex-runner concurrency if missing, and patched direct push paths to avoid non-fast-forward failures')
"""
No issue comments.
